profile.name: Ersa Azis Mansyur
profile.summary: Senior DevSecOps Engineer with extensive experience in architecting highly scalable and secure cloud infrastructures for general software hosting and highgrowth environments. Driven by high learning agility and a passion for emerging technologies, I have a proven track record of rapidly mastering and securing diverse platforms, from traditional web applications to AI and Web3 (ICP) ecosystems. Expert in accelerating deployment speed through automated CI/CD and AI/Data pipeline orchestration, while enforcing rigorous security protocols. Advanced proficiency in Kubernetes and the LGTM observability stack to enhance system reliability and minimize incident resolution time from hours to minutes. Focused on continuous innovation, automation, and maintaining high availability for large-scale, complex applications

bulletPoints: Automated CI/CD pipelines, reducing release time to under 2 minutes and significantly increasing deployment frequency and overall development efficiency.
Orchestrated the zero-downtime migration of 20+ services to a new cloud provider using Terraform and Ansible, standardizing infrastructure and dramatically accelerating setup time.
Managed and maintained Kubernetes clusters for application deployment, scaling, and high availability, ensuring consistent system reliability.
Optimized AWS infrastructure, including provisioning, monitoring, and cloud resource management to ensure stability and performance.
Implemented the LGTM stack (Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Mimir) for integrated observability, reducing investigation time from hours to minutes through centralized logging and distributed tracing.
Integrated automated Code Quality (SonarQube) and Security Scanning (Snyk) into the CI/CD pipelines within the SDLC to ensure security best practices.
Built multi-country cloud infrastructure in Australia and the US to ensure compliance with local regulations.
Leveraged GitHub Actions for seamless and automated deployments, improving cloud environment stability and performance.
Configured and maintained Docker Swarm, Nginx, and observability tools (Loki, Prometheus) to support reliable application operations.
Managed AI development environments, including Label Studio and notebook servers, to support AI engineering collaboration.
Led the migration from monolithic to microservices architecture, enabling the system to scale and handle thousands of concurrent users, directly contributing to increased company revenue.
Established CI/CD workflows using GitLabCI and Forge, significantly reducing manual deployment overhead.
Monitored and maintained a hybrid environment of cloud and on-premise servers.
Deployed various applications including Kubernetes, Proxmox, and the Prometheus/Loki stack to ensure smooth operational flow.
Managed CI/CD pipelines via GitLabCI and maintained server health across cloud and on-premise infrastructure.
Configured core infrastructure tools including Kubernetes, Nginx, and monitoring systems.

experience.company: Ministry of Religious Affairs of Indonesia
bulletPoints: Designed and developed a scalable web application and database schema to streamline the fund disbursement process for the 'Program Indonesia Pintar,' ensuring data integrity for thousands of recipients.
Coordinated with cross-functional development teams to ensure project milestones were met according to technical specifications and government regulations.
Collaborated with DevOps engineers to design and implement initial CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure, reducing manual deployment efforts.
